title: Dev v0.5.8 Feedback Top Action Layout
notes:
Moves Feedback actions to a top toolbar and improves spacing on the Dev Feedback page.

Changes:
- Moves Submit Feedback to Master to the top action toolbar.
- Moves Save Settings / Load Settings / Clear Token to the top action toolbar.
- Keeps feedback form below the toolbar.
- Improves spacing so the page feels less cramped.
- Keeps all Dev v0.5.7 feedback submission behavior.
